name: Sugar Isle Golf Course
address: 2469 N Dayton-Lakeview Rd, New Carlisle, OH 45344
about: Sugar Isle Golf Course is an 18-hole championship course designed to challenge experienced golfers while providing an enjoyable experience for players of all skill levels. The venue is set amidst beautiful scenery, featuring tranquil lakes and lush greenery. It offers a full-service experience including a pro shop, online tee time booking, and simulator golf leagues. The course is accessible for various leagues and events, including senior, evening, and teacher-specific groups.
why_golfers_like_it: Offers an 18-hole championship course with scenic views and challenging play
Provides indoor golf simulator technology with dedicated leagues
Features multiple league options for different skill levels and schedules
Includes a full pro shop and online booking system for convenience

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with food service
